reasoning: The control AC-3(7) focuses on enforcing role-based access control, which directly maps to Kubernetes RBAC. In Kubernetes, this is achieved through the use of Roles, ClusterRoles, RoleBindings, and ClusterRoleBindings. Ensuring that no ClusterRoleBinding grants cluster-admin privileges, enforcing least privilege, and ensuring RoleBindings are attached to ServiceAccounts are critical checks to ensure proper RBAC enforcement.
